metadata.thoughts:
**Clarifying transport strike details**

I’m working on the transport strike details for the national transport strike, or "sciopero nazionale del Tpl." For the times, I should set the start date to 2024-04-26 at 08:30 and end at 12:30. I need to ensure that the location codes are explicitly set to null because it’s a national event. Also, I must format the guaranteed times correctly as "08:30-12:30." I want to double-check these requirements to get everything right!
